public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as hostler.
manner: Thinks in wear, strain, and bottlenecks, treating neglect as a slow-moving threat. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a hostler still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of hostler in and around Stoneforge Depot, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Stoneforge Depot workable through the obligations of hostler while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must absorb delayed maintenance, thin staffing, and practical strain before failure becomes public. Around Stoneforge Depot, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of hostler visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Vera Stone can open restricted paths or practical knowledge if the party helps keep the underlying system alive.
Vera Stone needs outside help before wear, sabotage, or bottleneck pressure turns into a public failure in Stoneforge Depot.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Tool wear, work scars, or system-focused habits make Vera Stone visibly responsible for keeping something larger from failing.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Stoneforge Depot: worksites, depots, spans, loading points, maintenance corridors, or workshops
